name: False Life
description: Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, you gain 1d4 + 4 temporary hit points for the duration. These temporary hit points absorb damage before your real hit points, and vanish at the end of the duration.
effect: Gain 1d4+4 temporary hit points for 1 hour (no concentration required)
notes: Temporary HP tracked separately — they vanish after 1 hour or when depleted
No concentration — stacks with other concentration spells
